final:
module updown_counter(
	input reset_clk,
	input rst,
	input up,
	input down,
	
	output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge reset_clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            if (up && !down) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else if (!up && down) begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
